title: Rasa Roadmap
note: Projected from the current docs/work/ledger.md backlog.

milestones.title: Semantic truth and compatibility classification
milestones.summary: Replace blanket Clojure conformance posture with feature-specific classification and evidence. Maximize Clojure-shaped syntax; every intentional divergence names the Rasa goal it serves, while missing implementation remains a defect or deferral rather than a language difference.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/00-semantic-truth-and-runtime-foundation.md; docs/spec/index.md

Acceptance: Replace blanket Clojure conformance posture with feature-specific classification and evidence. Maximize Clojure-shaped syntax; every intentional divergence names the Rasa goal it serves, while missing implementation remains a defect or deferral rather than a language difference.

milestones.title: Ordinary runtime competence repairs
milestones.summary: Preserve source semantics while replacing vector_assoc whole-vector rebuilding with persistent structural update, making list conj prepend and vector conj append use the collection substrate rather than rebuilding through Vec, caching or preparing closure-body links by runtime snapshot/invalidation instead of relinking on every call, and replacing RuntimePackedBuffer's clonable Arc<Mutex<_>> mutation path with storage that enforces the admitted lane-local unique-authority model. Add behavior, asymptotic, allocation/locking, call-overhead, native, and runtime-Wasm proofs. No new syntax, metadata, or language divergence.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: crates/rasa-collections/README.md; crates/rasa-eval/README.md; crates/rasa-runtime/README.md

Acceptance: Preserve source semantics while replacing vector_assoc whole-vector rebuilding with persistent structural update, making list conj prepend and vector conj append use the collection substrate rather than rebuilding through Vec, caching or preparing closure-body links by runtime snapshot/invalidation instead of relinking on every call, and replacing RuntimePackedBuffer's clonable Arc<Mutex<_>> mutation path with storage that enforces the admitted lane-local unique-authority model. Add behavior, asymptotic, allocation/locking, call-overhead, native, and runtime-Wasm proofs. No new syntax, metadata, or language divergence.

Add behavior, asymptotic, allocation/locking, call-overhead, native, and runtime-Wasm proofs. No new syntax, metadata, or language divergence.

milestones.title: Value authority and mutability safety kernel
milestones.summary: One affine cell/handle/store mechanism carries owner, extent, generation, mutability, escape, movement, publication, cleanup, and synchronization authority. Concrete Rust cells are non-clonable; handles are aliases; transfer invalidates old handles and rehomes cleanup atomically. Ordinary vector-of construction remains the first shift-left refinement: checked i64/f64 contracts never imply packed storage. Open or unproved authority cannot admit mutation, movement, sharing, region allocation, or tasks. RESET-0007 consumes this kernel before further concurrency or capability movement.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/spec/002-data-model.md; docs/spec/008-collections-seqs.md; docs/architecture/runtime-memory-and-boundary-model.md; docs/work/active/RESET-0007-wasm-substrate-concurrency-base.md

Acceptance: One affine cell/handle/store mechanism carries owner, extent, generation, mutability, escape, movement, publication, cleanup, and synchronization authority. Concrete Rust cells are non-clonable; handles are aliases; transfer invalidates old handles and rehomes cleanup atomically. Ordinary vector-of construction remains the first shift-left refinement: checked i64/f64 contracts never imply packed storage. Open or unproved authority cannot admit mutation, movement, sharing, region allocation, or tasks. RESET-0007 consumes this kernel before further concurrency or capability movement.

milestones.title: Clojure-shaped source core and metadata normalization
milestones.summary: Stabilize user macro expansion/provenance and namespace behavior; analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for type contracts, function return contracts, docs, layout contracts, shape claims, and unsupported metadata diagnostics. Purity stays derived-only; function-level capability policy is not admitted.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/01-language-constitution.md

Acceptance: Stabilize user macro expansion/provenance and namespace behavior; analyzer emits normalized metadata role facts for type contracts, function return contracts, docs, layout contracts, shape claims, and unsupported metadata diagnostics. milestones.title: Function-level effect, capability, and suspension inference
milestones.summary: After CC-01 through CC-03: stable capability origins propagate through one existing compiler call graph without source coloring. Ordinary effectful code remains generically executable; inference improves localized policy, resource, region-split, and fallback diagnostics. Acceptance includes deep granted IO, denied IO, opaque-call fallback, recursive invalidation, zero parallel semantic engines, and story-level non-growth.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/spec/009-errors-effects.md; docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/03-capabilities-threat-and-effects.md

Acceptance: After CC-01 through CC-03: stable capability origins propagate through one existing compiler call graph without source coloring. Acceptance includes deep granted IO, denied IO, opaque-call fallback, recursive invalidation, zero parallel semantic engines, and story-level non-growth.

milestones.title: WMP-2 image data-plane proof
milestones.summary: In progress. Sobel and packed-loop proofs cover browser/runtime-Wasm parity, source-local refusal, scalar-parametric byte-aligned kernels, and measured execution. FC-05 now makes array/freeze! return PackedImmutable, keeps packed values across calls and the optimizer ABI, requires explicit array/materialize, and records packed boundary copies without ordinary-result rebuilding. Live pressure: retire ^rasa.array/Packed as admission authority through stronger lifecycle inference; add non-byte-aligned lowering, broader affine indexing and shapes, K-mer range facts, precise guard placement, and honest fallback measurements.
requiredCapabilities: Authority: docs/proposals/010-language-operational-spine/09-hard-problems-and-proof-workloads.md

Acceptance: In progress. Sobel and packed-loop proofs cover browser/runtime-Wasm parity, source-local refusal, scalar-parametric byte-aligned kernels, and measured execution. FC-05 now makes array/freeze! return PackedImmutable, keeps packed values across calls and the optimizer ABI, requires explicit array/materialize, and records packed boundary copies without ordinary-result rebuilding. Live pressure: retire ^rasa.array/Packed as admission authority through stronger lifecycle inference; add non-byte-aligned lowering, broader affine indexing and shapes, K-mer range facts, precise guard placement, and honest fallback measurements.

milestones.title: Suspension boundary diagnostics
milestones.summary: Internally derived suspension origins and their closed/open tail propagate without source async coloring; only closed-empty evidence enters a proven non-suspending region, while known or open origins produce a precise refusal diagnostic.
